title: Validate file uploads (type and size)
description:
# Issue #66 - Users can upload anything, of any size

Our avatar upload endpoint accepts raw file bytes (POST /api/upload?filename=...). Today it stores .exe files and a tester uploaded a 4GB file that filled the disk.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- only png, jpg, jpeg, gif and pdf extensions are accepted (case-insensitive) - anything else returns 415
- bodies larger than MAX_BYTES (1 MiB) return 413
- empty bodies return 400
- valid uploads keep returning {filename, size, status}
optimal_hint: Ideal: extract the extension with filename.rsplit('.', 1) (reject names without a dot), lowercase it, check against ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS -> 415; len(body) > MAX_BYTES -> 413; len(body) == 0 -> 400. Use the existing MAX_BYTES/ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS constants rather than re-hardcoding values.
